---
title: "dormancy.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\skills\local\dormancy.py"
loc: 119
complexity: 16
logic_score: 0.85
style_score: 3.57
intel_score: 2.74
overall_score: 1.00
---

## Intent
The `dormancy.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on consolidated_memory, main. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via consolidated_memory, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 34 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [time](file://time)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [json](file://json)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.core.mimir_client](file://src.core.mimir_client)
- [src.cstar.core.uplink](file://src.cstar.core.uplink)

### Exports
- `consolidated_memory`
- `main`
